text:
Individual bramble pies
Serves 4
For the pastry
11og butter, softened , plus extra to grease
135g caster sugar
225g strong plain flour, plus extra for dusting
A pinch of salt
1/2 tsp baking powder
125ml double cream

For the filing
800g blackberries
L 20g caster sugar
1 tsp arrowroot or cornflour, mixed with 1 tbsp
